After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I confirm alignment with the original reasoning. Standard GCS guidelines explicitly assign a verbal score of 1 to intubated patients, and abnormal flexion to pain corresponds to a motor score of 3 — consistently supported across multiple sources (e.g., source [6], [16]). These assignments correctly yield E2V1M3, matching option C.
